{{Location|title=Bharata|imagecaption=Map of Bharata|type=|image=File:Bharata Full Map.png}}

==Bharata==
This incredible nation features delicious curry, unique dance and music, and diversified beliefs.

Bharata is the 8th of 8 [[Realms]].
{{realm table}}
==INTEL==
See [[Bharata INTEL]] for INTEL tables.

==Apostles ==
See [[Bharata Apostles]] for each Apostles' stats.

==Card Conversions==
See [[Bharata Cards]] for a list of all limited cards in Bharata and what they can be redeemed for.

==Key Clue Records==
See [[Bharata Key Clues]] for a list of all Key Clues in Bharata, how to complete them, and what they reward.

==Journey to the West==
See [[Journey to the West]] to see more about the traveling monks in Bharata. 

==Realm Trait -Dragon Horse ==
See [[Dragon Horse]] for information on cost, stats, and unsealing. 

[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Bharata]]
